subtasks.description: Query budget allocation by product category with historical cost trends (YoY comparison, monthly trend lines, category share of total budget)
Reconcile budget allocation patterns with cost trend signals, classify spending efficiency by category, and generate reallocation recommendations with rationale

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen (mid-tier) to extract budget and cost trend data across categories—requires multi-table joins (budgets, transactions/spend tables, category hierarchies) with aggregation and time-series grouping, but no complex window functions needed yet; (2) cross_recon (frontier-tier) to synthesize budget vs. actual spend, classify efficiency signals, and produce strategic reallocation recommendations with trade-off reasoning. Frontier is justified because recommendation generation requires multi-signal inference (spending patterns, category growth, risk factors) and structured narrative rationale. No separate policy_action needed—governance alignment is part of the reallocation logic. No multitool_plan needed—this is purely analytical. Plan is minimal: the SQL captures all data needed, cross_recon performs all downstream analysis and recommendation in a single synthesizing call.

output.sql: WITH monthly_costs AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date)::DATE AS month, cf.product, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS monthly_cost FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.event_date >= '2023-01-01' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date)::DATE, cf.product), yearly_totals AS (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM cf.event_date)::INT AS year, cf.product, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS yearly_cost FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.event_date >= '2023-01-01' GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM cf.event_date)::INT, cf.product), category_share AS (SELECT cf.product, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS total_budget, SUM(cf.amount_usd) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(amount_usd) FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2023-01-01') AS pct_of_total FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.event_date >= '2023-01-01' GROUP BY cf.product), yoy_comparison AS (SELECT yt1.product, yt1.year AS year_current, yt2.year AS year_prior, yt1.yearly_cost AS current_year_cost, yt2.yearly_cost AS prior_year_cost, CASE WHEN yt2.yearly_cost > 0 THEN ((yt1.yearly_cost - yt2.yearly_cost) / yt2.yearly_cost * 100) ELSE NULL END AS yoy_growth_pct FROM yearly_totals yt1 LEFT JOIN yearly_totals yt2 ON yt1.product = yt2.product AND yt1.year = yt2.year + 1) SELECT mc.product, mc.month, mc.monthly_cost, cs.total_budget, cs.pct_of_total, yc.year_current, yc.current_year_cost, yc.prior_year_cost, yc.yoy_growth_pct FROM monthly_costs mc LEFT JOIN category_share cs ON mc.product = cs.product LEFT JOIN yoy_comparison yc ON mc.product = yc.product ORDER BY mc.product, mc.month DESC;
